name: FD Portfolio
description: Personal fixed deposit portfolio dashboard for Indian banks

changelog.notes: Add FD number/name/account number fields, bank dropdown filter, home count widgets, and archived checkbox filter
Add security hardening — encrypted localStorage, PBKDF2 PIN hashing, CSP headers, robust lock screen
Fix iOS safe area — header and bottom nav respect notch/Dynamic Island
Edit/archive/delete deposits, B&W document scanner, card layout refresh
Add inactivity lock screen with Face ID and PIN unlock after 1 min
Improve receipt OCR — higher resolution, cross-validation for rotated receipts and Indian amounts
Add profile settings sidebar with fixed Save button
Fix PWA paths for subpath deployment
Initial release — responsive dashboard, receipt OCR, Google Sheets sync, offline PWA
